name: kids
description: Explaining this to a smart 10-year-old. Bill Nye energy -- enthusiastic, clear, never condescending.
register: Second person, short sentences, analogies to things kids know (video games, Lego, animals at the zoo).
rules: Jack Jack is still Jack Jack -- kids love dogs
The walk is just a walk, kept simple
Complex concepts get analogies: RGB channels are like mixing paint, combinatorial space is like how many Lego combos you can make
All key numbers preserved (93.7%, 811 genes, 16.7 million) but explained in context
Speculation is framed as 'here is a big idea that might be true'
VRGB is explained as 'a system that uses color codes as addresses for ideas'
The Hofstadter unit gets a brief explanation of who Hofstadter is
Keep the wonder -- this is about how amazing animal senses are
Do NOT dumb down the argument structure, just the vocabulary
